name:
Verify if external links in the Header for an authorized user 
            lead to correct pages after click

steps.name:
Get the list of the 'Donate', 'GitHub' links (external links) 
                    in the 'More' dropdown for authorized user

Get the list of links (internal and external) in the 'More' dropdown in the Header
                 for every user

Click on external links in the Header and thereby open corresponding web pages on new tabs 
    for every user
Click on the 'More' button for every user

Get the list of the 'Donate', 'GitHub' links (external links) 
                    in the 'More' dropdown for authorized user

Get the list of links (internal and external) in the 'More' dropdown in the Header
                 for every user
